info.name: ModelLink API
info.description:
ModelLink marketplace backend (v2026).

**Setup**
1. Set `base_url` (default `http://localhost:8000/api`)
2. Run **Auth → Login** — saves `jwt_token`, `user_id`, `user_role`
3. Other requests inherit Bearer auth automatically

**Variables auto-saved by tests:** order_id, model_id, version_id, payment_intent_id, review_id, conversation_id, dispute_id, payout_id, category_id

**Regenerate:** `node reference/generate-postman-collection.js`

exec: // Collection uses Bearer {{jwt_token}} — run Auth > Login first.

request.description: Returns `{ status: "success" }` when server is up.

item.name: 1. Auth
item.description: Register, login, OTP password reset. Login/Register save jwt_token.

request.description: Accepts `email` OR `org_username` + `password`. Saves token + user vars.

body.raw:
// role: CLIENT or DEVELOPER only (not ADMIN)
{
  "email": "newclient@example.com",
  "org_username": "newclient",
  "org_name": "Acme Corp",
  "org_phone": "01000000000",
  "password": "Password@123!",
  "passwordConfirm": "Password@123!",
  "country": "EG",
  "role": "CLIENT"
}

item.name: 2. Users
item.description: Profiles — public routes need no auth.

request.description: Set target_user_id or replace in path.

item.name: 3. Admin — Users
item.description: Requires ADMIN or EMPLOYEE (except create admin/employee).

item.name: 4. Admin — Platform
item.description: Audit logs, settings, transactions, webhooks, badges.

request.description: Use form-data in Postman for gallery images. JSON fields below for reference.

body.raw:
// Prefer form-data: field "data" = JSON string of model + primary version
{
  "title": "Brain MRI Segmenter",
  "category": "Segmentation",
  "desc": "High-accuracy brain segmentation model",
  "tags": ["mri", "brain"],
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "price": 150,
  "deliveryTime": 3,
  "indications": "Stroke, tumor detection",
  "modalityId": 1,
  "bodyPartId": 1
}

item.name: 8. Orders
item.description: Client checkout → webhook → delivery. Uses order_id variable.

request.description: CLIENT only. Model must be PUBLISHED. Saves order_id + payment_intent_id.
Works in development / MARKETPLACE_DEMO without real Stripe signature.

item.name: 9. Reviews
item.description: byModel is public (optional auth). CRUD requires auth.

request.description: Order must be DELIVERED. One review per client per model.
Local/demo only when MARKETPLACE_DEMO=true or non-production.
Requires valid STRIPE key in server .env. Returns onboarding URL.
Use form-data: document file + optional notes field.

item.name: 14. Messaging
item.description: Conversations + messages between client and developer.

item.name: 16. Support
item.description: Contact form — optional auth attaches user context.
